amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Annex I
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Annex I

## Text proposed by the Commission

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNIQUES AND APPROACHES referred to in Article 3, point 1

(a) Machine learning approaches, including supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement learning, using a wide variety of methods including deep learning;

(a)

(b) Logic- and knowledge-based approaches, including knowledge representation, inductive (logic) programming, knowledge bases, inference and deductive engines, (symbolic) reasoning and expert systems;

(b)

(c) Statistical approaches, Bayesian estimation, search and optimization methods.

(c)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

deleted



Machine learning approaches, including supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement learning, using a wide variety of methods including deep learning;



Logic- and knowledge-based approaches, including knowledge representation, inductive (logic) programming, knowledge bases, inference and deductive engines, (symbolic) reasoning and expert systems;



Statistical approaches, Bayesian estimation, search and optimization methods.
commission_text:
ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNIQUES AND APPROACHES referred to in Article 3, point 1

(a) Machine learning approaches, including supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement learning, using a wide variety of methods including deep learning;

(a)

(b) Logic- and knowledge-based approaches, including knowledge representation, inductive (logic) programming, knowledge bases, inference and deductive engines, (symbolic) reasoning and expert systems;

(b)

(c) Statistical approaches, Bayesian estimation, search and optimization methods.

(c)
